name: Apple Brown Betty (Another Version)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups peeled and sliced apples (5 to 6 medium-sized apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly butter a 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
3. Combine the bread crumbs with the white sugar and melted butter. Spread half of this mixture in the bottom of the baking dish.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the apples, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, lemon juice, zest, and chopped walnuts.
5. Spread these ingredients over the bread crumb layer in the baking dish.
6. Top with the remaining bread crumb mixture.
7. Cover the dish and bake for 40 minutes.
8. Remove the cover, increase the heat to 400°F, and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve warm with cream, whipped cream, or ice cream.
YIELD: 6 servings
